perRun.text: To connect your Webflow site to FlowBlinq GEO, follow these steps: 1. **Add the Tracking Pixel**: - Go to your Webflow project settings. - Navigate to **Custom Code**. - In the **Footer Code** section, add the following tracking pixel: ```html ``` - Replace `YOUR-SLUG` with your specific slug provided by FlowBlinq GEO. 2. **Set Up Proxy Routes**: - Use Webflow's reverse proxy feature or Cloudflare Workers to serve the GEO-generated files. You will need to configure the following routes: - `/llms.txt` → proxied from FlowBlinq GEO - `/llms-full.txt` → extended version - `/.well-known/ucp.json` → structured business data for AI agents 3. **Edit the robots.txt**: - Go to **Project Settings** → **SEO** → **robots.txt**. - Ensure that you allow AI crawlers (like GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot) to access your GEO files. 4. **Deploy Structured Data**: - You can add JSON-LD structured data in the **Head Code** section of your project settings or on a per-page basis. Once you've completed these steps, your Webflow site will be connected to FlowBlinq GEO, enhancing its visibility to AI agents! If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask.
